description: Remove outdated year references (2024-2025) and inject current time context into Gemini MCP tools AND Claude Code WebSearch tools

hooks.command:
python3 -c "import sys,json,re;from datetime import datetime,timedelta;d=json.load(sys.stdin);ti=d.get('tool_input',{});n=datetime.now();cy=str(n.year);cd=n.strftime('%Y-%m-%d');sma=n-timedelta(days=180);tc=f'Current date: {cd}. Focus on recent information from {sma.strftime(\"%B %Y\")} onwards.';oy=['2024','2025'] if cy not in ['2024','2025'] else [];def ct(t):
  if not t or not isinstance(t,str):return t
  c=t
  for y in oy:
    if y!=cy:
      c=re.sub(r'\\b'+re.escape(y)+r'\\b',cy,c)
      c=re.sub(r'\\b'+re.escape(y)+r'\\s+(tutorial|guide|article|news|update|release|version|best practices|implementation|research|study|paper|development|advancement|trend|breakthrough|framework|library|tool)\\b',f'{cy} \\1',c,flags=re.I)
  if not re.search(r'current date|as of|recent|latest|\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}|since \\d{4}',c,re.I):
    c=f'{c} ({tc})'
  return c
if 'query' in ti and ti['query']:
  o=str(ti['query']);cl=ct(o)
  if cl!=o:ti['query']=cl
print(json.dumps({'modifiedToolInput':ti}))"
